label: intents
peekOfCode:
intents = discord.Intents.default()
intents.message_content = True
intents.members = True
bot = commands.Bot(command_prefix="!", intents=intents)
@bot.event
async def on_ready():
    if not bot.user:
        raise ValueError("Bot user not found.")
    print(f"#- Logged on as {bot.user}!")
    await bot.tree.sync()
